scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:compat: node scripts/missing-command.mjs test:compat "Compatibility fixtures are planned after the H1 matrix is finalized."
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/missing-command.mjs test:e2e "Native end-to-end coverage is not configured yet."
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && npm run core:typecheck && npm run showcase:typecheck
scripts.benchmark: node scripts/missing-command.mjs benchmark "Benchmark scenarios are not configured yet."
scripts.visual:test: npm run showcase:build && playwright test -c apps/showcase-web/playwright.config.ts
scripts.visual:update: npm run showcase:build && playwright test -c apps/showcase-web/playwright.config.ts --update-snapshots
scripts.example:ios: node scripts/missing-command.mjs example:ios "React Native CLI iOS example is not configured yet."
scripts.example:android: node scripts/missing-command.mjs example:android "React Native CLI Android example is not configured yet."
scripts.example:expo: node scripts/missing-command.mjs example:expo "Expo example is not configured yet."
scripts.docs:build: node scripts/missing-command.mjs docs:build "Docs site build is not configured yet."
